data_step.stdout:

schema_step.name: /Users/nick/miniconda3/bin/python /Users/nick/guideai/scripts/run_postgres_behavior_migration.py
schema_step.stdout:
-- Dry run --
[1] -- guideAI BehaviorService PostgreSQL schema
-- Creates tables and indexes required to operate BehaviorService on Postgres.

BEGIN

[2] CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS behaviors (
    behavior_id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    description TEXT NOT NULL,
    tags JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
    latest_version TEXT NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL
)

[3] CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS behavior_versions (
    behavior_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES behaviors(behavior_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    version TEXT NOT NULL,
    instruction TEXT NOT NULL,
    role_focus TEXT NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL,
    trigger_keywords JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
    examples JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
    metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    effective_from TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
    effective_to TIMESTAMPTZ,
    created_by TEXT NOT NULL,
    approval_action_id TEXT,
    embedding_checksum TEXT,
    embedding BYTEA,
    PRIMARY KEY (behavior_id, version)
)

[4] CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_behaviors_status ON behaviors (status)

[5] CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_behaviors_updated_at ON behaviors (updated_at DESC)

[6] CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_behaviors_tags_gin ON behaviors USING GIN (tags jsonb_path_ops)

[7] CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_behavior_versions_status ON behavior_versions (status)

[8] CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_behavior_versions_role_focus ON behavior_versions (role_focus)

[9] CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_behavior_versions_effective_from ON behavior_versions (effective_from)

[10] COMMIT

schema_step.name: /Users/nick/miniconda3/bin/python /Users/nick/guideai/scripts/run_postgres_workflow_migration.py
schema_step.stdout:
-- Dry run --
[1] -- guideAI WorkflowService PostgreSQL schema
-- Aligns with the SQLite workflow runtime defined in `guideai/workflow_service.py`.

BEGIN

[2] CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workflow_templates (
    template_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    description TEXT,
    role_focus TEXT NOT NULL,
    version TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
    created_by_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_by_role TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_by_surface TEXT NOT NULL,
    template_data JSONB NOT NULL,
    tags JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb
)

[3] CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workflow_runs (
    run_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    template_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workflow_templates(template_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    template_name TEXT NOT NULL,
    role_focus TEXT NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL,
    actor_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    actor_role TEXT NOT NULL,
    actor_surface TEXT NOT NULL,
    started_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
    completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    total_tokens INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    run_data JSONB NOT NULL
)

[4] CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_workflow_templates_role_focus ON workflow_templates (role_focus)

[5] CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_workflow_templates_created_at ON workflow_templates (created_at DESC)

[6] CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_workflow_templates_tags_gin ON workflow_templates USING GIN (tags jsonb_path_ops)

[7] CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_workflow_runs_template_id ON workflow_runs (template_id)

[8] CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_workflow_runs_status ON workflow_runs (status)

[9] CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_workflow_runs_started_at ON workflow_runs (started_at DESC)

[10] COMMIT
